defaults.style_notes: clean stylized 3D game character concept art, orthographic model-sheet lighting, animation-ready proportions, symmetrical anatomy, clear silhouette, full body visible, centered on a plain white background
defaults.negative_notes: no text, no labels, no watermark, no ground grid, no dramatic perspective, no cropped limbs, no extra characters, no duplicate animal, no action pose

prompt_template: Create reference art for one symmetrical four-legged animal intended for Tripo3D mesh generation. Animal: {animal_description}. Equipment: {equipment_description}. View: {view_instruction}. Style: {style_notes}. Constraints: neutral standing pose, legs visible and separated, head-tail body axis clear, left and right sides anatomically balanced, surface details simple enough for a clean low-poly mesh. Avoid: {negative_notes}.

views.front: front orthographic view, animal facing directly toward the camera
views.left: left side orthographic profile, animal facing toward the viewer's left
views.right: right side orthographic profile, animal facing toward the viewer's right
views.back: back orthographic view, animal facing directly away from the camera

specs.animal_description: athletic medium-sized dog with a straight tail, alert ears, lean chest, and balanced working-dog proportions
specs.equipment_description: light symmetrical leather-and-brushed-steel adventuring armor on the chest, shoulders, and hips, with all leg joints unobstructed

specs.animal_description: sleek domestic cat with upright ears, long tail, compact paws, and flexible feline proportions
specs.equipment_description: none, visible natural fur and anatomy with simple markings

specs.animal_description: slim agile cat with upright ears, long tail, compact paws, and balanced feline proportions
specs.equipment_description: minimal symmetrical scout armor with a small chest harness, shoulder plates, and hip plates, leaving knees, elbows, ankles, and paws clear

specs.animal_description: stocky frog with wide-set eyes, broad body, short front legs, powerful folded rear legs, and webbed feet
specs.equipment_description: none, smooth natural skin with simple color patterning

specs.animal_description: stocky ram with curled horns, sturdy hooves, compact torso, and strong shoulders
specs.equipment_description: symmetrical fantasy plate barding over chest and flanks, with clean open gaps around knees, ankles, and hooves

specs.animal_description: rabbit with long upright ears, compact torso, small front paws, large rear feet, and a short tail
specs.equipment_description: none, soft simple fur silhouette with anatomy visible

specs.animal_description: low turtle with domed shell, short tail, sturdy head and neck, and four clearly visible walking legs
specs.equipment_description: none, natural shell plates simplified into readable broad shapes

specs.animal_description: slender deer with long legs, small hooves, narrow chest, short tail, and modest antlers
specs.equipment_description: none, natural coat with subtle markings and unobstructed joints
